promoted_facts.fact: Brand Hotel franchisees received $21,841,628 more in loyalty program reimbursements than they paid in loyalty program fees during 2024
Hyatt Corporation affiliates collected about $491,320 in fees from providing products/services to Brand Hotel franchisees in 2024 (not including Commercial Services Fee)
5% of total operating revenue must be deposited monthly into CapEx Account for capital expenditures/upgrades
PMS/POS vendor currently charges $3.90/room/month for support
Sound system vendor charges $18.95/month for quarterly playlist updates
Pre-opening marketing minimum: $500 × number of guest rooms
Franchise sellers listed on receipt: Daniel Hansen, James Bertram, Rika Lisslo, Ryan McNamara, Joshua Siebert, James Tierney, Christina Wells
